name: Carrot Date Nut Bread
recipeIngredient: 1 Orange, remove seeds and cut into small pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Put carrots in a heavy saucepan with 1 cup water and 1/2 teaspoon each salt and sugar. Cover and simmer until tender, 25 to 30 minutes.
2. Drain if all moisture has not evaporated.
3. Put orange, buttermilk, and carrots in a blender. Whirl until pureed. You should have about 2 cups of puree.
4. Sift flour with dry ingredients except sugar into a mixing bowl.
5. Beat eggs in the mixing bowl, then beat in sugar, oil, and carrot puree.
6. Stir in the dry mixture and mix until well blended but do not beat.
7. Stir in dates and nuts.
8. Spread batter in 2 greased and floured small loaf pans (about 8-1/2 x 4-1/2 x 2-1/2 inches).
9. Bake at 350 degrees F for 45 minutes to 1 hour, or until a pick inserted near the center comes out clean.
10. Remove from pans to wire racks and cool overnight before cutting. Makes 2 loaves.
